docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED JUL-18-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZACK, KIRIL
DECLARATION OF KIRIL ZACK RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT ZACK, KIRIL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-03-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY DEFENDANT ZACK, KIRIL
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CONTANTINE ZHUKOVSKY IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT KIRIL ZACK VIA TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE. BOTH PARTIES WERE ORDERED AT THE OCT-3-2019 HEARING TO ADVISE COURT OF ARBITRATION STATUS. DEFENDANT ADVISED TO APPEAR TELEPHONICALLY. DEFENDANT WAS INFORMED OF ARBITRATRION OPTION BUT STATED THAT PLAINTIFF DID NOT WANT TO PARTICIPATE. HONORABLE A. JAMES ROBERSON II ORDERED THIS CASE TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2019 - CONTINUED TO NOV-13-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS TO SERVE DEFENDANT WITH "NOTICE OF CLIENTS RIGHT TO FEE ARBITRATION" BY U.S. MAIL. IF MATTER IS IN ARBITRATION, PARTIES ARE TO APPEAR, (DEFENDANT MAY APPEAR TELEPHONICALLY) AND INFORM THE COURT, OTHERWISE THE JUDGE WILL HEAR THIS MATTER ON NOV-13-2019 AT 8:30 A.M.
